p.c: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat, x2: Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ sequence_tail_set(x0, x1) and k0 ∈ x2 } = sequence_tail_meets_set(x0, x1, x2) }(a, n, s)
not exists(k0: Real) { k0 ∈ sequence_tail_set(a, n) and k0 ∈ s } or sequence_tail_meets_set(a, n, s)
(forall(x0: Real) { not (x0 ∈ sequence_tail_set(a, n) and x0 ∈ s) or sequence_tail_meets_set(a, n, s) })

goal: exists(k0: Real) { sequence_tail_set(a, m).contains(k0) and s.contains(k0) }

p.c: function(x0: Real) { not (x0 ∈ sequence_tail_set(a, m) and x0 ∈ s) }(x)

let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ sequence_tail_set(a, m) and w0 ∈ s }

goal: sequence_tail_meets_set(a, m, s) = exists(k0: Real) { sequence_tail_set(a, m).intersection(s).contains(k0) }
